version_description: A version convenient for guitar players in the original key (with capo at 1st fret) also has Intro and Outro parts.

versions.version_description: I started with the tab submitted byKurt1964 then transposed it to G so that some missing chords could easily be played. PLEASE NOTE: For Gaug -use a cowboy G chord but hit the Eb on the D string with your index finger. For FAF - play an F chord on the high EBGD strings but leave the B string open. Play the G7 by moving the index finger up one space to E on the D string. Em/Eb just play an Em and drop the E on the D string to an Eb. Em7 just l=eave the D string open and hit the B on the A string. Em/C# play an E on the D string and a C# on the A string. For Cadd9 just hit the C on the B string and leave the rest open. .

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
(See below the song for a guide to some of the uncommon chords.)

***Capo 1st fret; all chords relative to capo
   For piano players, transpose 1 half-step up


[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Caug[/ch]  [ch]C6[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F6[/ch] [ch]Gsus[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Caug[/ch]
 Every now and then I cry[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C6[/ch]               [ch]C7[/ch]
Every night, you keep staying on my mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Am7/E[/ch]     [ch]Eaug[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Am7/G[/ch]
 All my friends say I'll survive[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am/F#[/ch]  [ch]Fm6[/ch]
It just takes time[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]              [ch]Dm7/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
  But I don't think time is gonna heal this broken heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Am7[/ch]                 [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Esus[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
  No, I don't see how it can if it's broken all apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Abaug[/ch]          [ch]Am7/G[/ch]            [ch]Am/F#[/ch]
  A million miracles could never stop the pain[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]C/E[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Am/F#[/ch] [ch]Gsus[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Or put all the pieces together  again[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]Dm7[/ch]              [ch]Dm7/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
  No, I don't think time is gonna heal this broken heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]Esus[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
  No, I don't see how it can while we are still apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]Abaug[/ch]              [ch]Am7/G[/ch]               [ch]Am/F#[/ch] [ch]Fm6[/ch]
  And when you hear  this song, I hope that you will see[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]G7sus[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
That time won't heal a broken-hear-ted me[/tab]


[Interlude]
[ch]Caug[/ch]  [ch]C6[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C/E[/ch] [ch]F6[/ch] [ch]Gsus[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Caug[/ch]
 Every day is just the same[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C6[/ch]               [ch]C7[/ch]
Playing games, different lovers, different names[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Am7/E[/ch]  [ch]Eaug[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Am7/G[/ch]
 They keep saying I'll survive[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am/F#[/ch]  [ch]Fm6[/ch]
It just takes time[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]Dm7[/ch]              [ch]Dm7/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
  But I don't think time is gonna heal this broken heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]Am7[/ch]                 [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Esus[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
  No, I don't see how it can if it's broken all apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Abaug[/ch]          [ch]Am7/G[/ch]            [ch]Am/F#[/ch]
  A million miracles could never stop the pain[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]C/E[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Am/F#[/ch] [ch]Gsus[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Or put all the pieces together  again[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]Dm7[/ch]              [ch]Dm7/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
  No, I don't think time is gonna heal this broken heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]Dm7[/ch]            [ch]Esus[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
  No, I don't see how it can while we are still apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]Abaug[/ch]              [ch]Am7/G[/ch]               [ch]Am/F#[/ch] [ch]Fm6[/ch]
  And when you hear  this song, I hope that you will see[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]G7sus[/ch]   [ch]G7[/ch]
That time won't heal a broken-hear-ted[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]G7sus[/ch]   [ch]G7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Time won't heal a broken-hear-ted  me[/tab]


[Outro]
[ch]F/C[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]F/C[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]F/C[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]


*****Illustrated Chords (EADGBe)*****
All chords relative to capo
x = dead string       0 = open string

[ch]Caug[/ch]   x32110
[tab][ch]C6[/ch]     x32210
F6     xx323x or xx3231[/tab]
[ch]Gsus[/ch]   355533
[ch]Eaug[/ch]   032110
[ch]Am/F#[/ch]  2x2210
[ch]Fm6[/ch]    133131
[tab][ch]Dm7/G[/ch]  3x0221
Abaug  xx6554 or 4x6554[/tab]
[ch]G7sus[/ch]  353533
[ch]G7[/ch]     353433


Enjoy!
